project.name: SDC UI
project.description: Angular 18 SPA — file inspector, compression preview, waveform viewer. Build: npm install and ng build --configuration=production. The frontend-maven-plugin will be added in TASK-027 to integrate the npm build into the Maven reactor. Until then, build sdc-ui separately via npm. To skip the UI in Maven: mvn install -Dskip.ui=true
